description:
Returns all Delay Logs for the current date.

See [Working with Daily Logs](https://developers.procore.com/documentation/daily-logs) for information on filtering the response using the log\_date, start\_date, and end\_date parameters. Note that if none of the date parameters are provided in the call, only logs from the current date are returned.

parameters.name: log_date
parameters.description: Date of specific logs desired in YYYY-MM-DD format

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: Start date of specific logs desired in YYYY-MM-DD format (use together with end_date)

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.description: End date of specific logs desired in YYYY-MM-DD format (use together with start_date)

parameters.name: filters[created_by_id]
parameters.description: Returns item(s) created by the specified User IDs.

parameters.name: filters[location_id]
parameters.description: Return item(s) with the specified Location IDs.

duration.description: Number of hours the delay lasted (between 1 and 24)

end_time.description: Time when the delay ended, Format: HH:MM Example: 21:39

end_time_hour.description: Number between 0 and 23 representing hour of day

position.description: Order in which this entry was recorded

status.description: Is a log pending or approved

start_time_hour.description: Number between 0 and 23 representing hour of day

updated_at.description: Timestamp of last update to Location

deleted_at.description: Timestamp when the segment was soft deleted

deleted.description: Indicates if the segment is deleted

403.description: User does not have right permissions
